source_jobs.title: Commercial Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
Infisical is the open source security infrastructure platform that engineers use for secrets management, certificates, and privileged access management. We help developers and organizations securely manage billions of secrets every month including application configuration, database credentials, certificates, and more.



We’ve raised $19M from Y Combinator, Google, and Elad Gil, and our customers include Hugging Face, Lucid, and LG.



Join us on a mission to make security easier for all developers — starting with secrets management. We’re looking to hire exceptional talent to join us in building the open source security infrastructure stack for the AI era.



About the role

As a Commercial Account Executive, you’ll be responsible for growing the customer base and closing net-new logos for Infisical’s secrets management platform. We are building the #1 open-source security infrastructure stack, and you will play a defining role in growing it!

 

You will be working closely with our CEO and the rest of the team on:

 - Understanding and demonstrating our products to prospects.

 - Developing, managing, and closing business within accounts in our commercial accounts segment.

 - Driving the sales cycle from prospect to close and ensuring adoption and consumption of our products.

 - Collaborating with the engineering team to define customer requirements and communicate timelines.

 - Identifying current customers with upsell and cross-sell opportunities.

 - Using innovative sales tools to map, prospect, follow and close your accounts.

 

Overall, you’re going to be one of the defining pieces of our team as we scale to thousands of customers over the next 18 months.

 

Requirements

 - Experience selling software to a technical audience (bonus: knowledge and experience with open source, security, and/or infrastructure sales)

 - Demonstrated experience in scaling sales operations from the ground up, including setting up sales processes, and CRM systems.

 - Credibility, and ability to craft compelling cases for change.

 - Experience in navigating multi-stakeholder sales (e.g., IC engineer, director, executive leadership).

 - Based in or willing to relocate to San Francisco, CA or Austin, TX.

 

Team, values & benefits

Our team brings experience from companies like Databricks, AWS, Red Hat, and more. We operate primarily as a remote team, but maintain a strong presence in San Francisco, where we have an office. We also get together in person throughout the year for off-sites, conferences, and team gatherings.

 

At Infisical, we offer competitive compensation, including both salary and equity options. Additional benefits, such as a lunch stipend and a work setup budget, are available with more details to be found on our careers page https://infisical.com/careers.

source_jobs.title: Solutions Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Infisical is the open source security infrastructure platform that engineers use for secrets management, certificates, and privileged access management. We help developers and organizations securely manage billions of secrets every month including application configuration, database credentials, certificates, and more.



We’ve raised $19M from Y Combinator, Google, and Elad Gil, and our customers include Hugging Face, Lucid, and LG.



Join us on a mission to make security easier for all developers — starting with secrets management. We’re looking to hire exceptional talent to join us in building the open source security infrastructure stack for the AI era.



About the role

We’re looking for an exceptional Solutions Engineer to help grow Infisical’s customer base and ensure a seamless product experience from onboarding to long-term success.



This is a high-impact, customer-facing role where you’ll work closely with our CEO, sales, and engineering teams. You'll play a critical role in helping organizations adopt Infisical by demonstrating technical value, driving successful implementations, and expanding product usage across accounts.



You’ll be working directly with the CEO, engineering, and sales teams on:

 - Running proof-of-concept with leads, guiding customer through onboarding, or being able to recommend best practices for specific architectures and use cases.

 - Ensuring new customers are activated, happy, and have all of their questions answered;

 - Becoming a trusted technical advisor to customer and business leaders.

 - Working in tandem with account executives to lead demo & discovery calls.

 - Talking to customers daily to find points of friction and potential improvement in any workflows, understanding customer's needs and provide feedback towards product roadmap.

 - Understanding user journey and being able to guide UX/DX roadmap

 - Hosting webinars and knowledge sharing sessions for customer's stakeholders.

 - Improving documentation and public facing materials based on customer feedback.
   
   

Overall, you’re going to be one of the defining pieces of our team as we scale to thousands of customers over the next 18 months.



Requirements

 - Prior experience in development, systems engineering, or DevOps (open source contributions are a plus).

 - Strong written and verbal communication skills—able to clearly articulate technical concepts.

 - High energy, high ownership mindset, and a willingness to operate in ambiguity.

 - Currently based in London, UK.



Nice to have

 - Familiarity with secret management tools or developer security platforms.

 - Solid understanding of developer workflows and/or DevSecOps infrastructure.

 - Prior experience in a startup or fast-scaling environment.

 - Past involvement in developer communities or public speaking (webinars, talks, etc.).

 - Experience in a customer-facing technical role (e.g., Solutions Engineer, Sales Engineer, DevRel).

 - Experience supporting enterprise accounts and working with technical stakeholders.



Team, values & benefits

Our team brings experience from companies like Databricks, AWS, Red Hat, and more. We operate primarily as a remote team, but maintain a strong presence in San Francisco, where we have an office. We also get together in person throughout the year for off-sites, conferences, and team gatherings.

 

At Infisical, we offer competitive compensation, including both salary and equity options. Additional benefits, such as a lunch stipend and a work setup budget, are available with more details to be found on our careers page https://infisical.com/careers.

source_jobs.title: Design Engineer, Brand
source_jobs.description:
Infisical is the open source security infrastructure platform that engineers use for secrets management, certificates, and privileged access management. We help developers and organizations securely manage billions of secrets every month including application configuration, database credentials, certificates, and more.



We’ve raised $19M from Y Combinator, Google, and Elad Gil, and our customers include Hugging Face, Lucid, and LG.



Join us on a mission to make security easier for all developers — starting with secrets management. We’re looking to hire exceptional talent to join us in building the open source security infrastructure stack for the AI era.



About the role

We're looking for a Design Engineer (Brand) to help shape how the world discovers, understands, and experiences Infisical.

This is an intentionally broad role for someone who is passionate about design, engineering, and creative problem solving. You'll co-own the landing page https://infisical.com/, own our brand across every touchpoint, design everything from blog graphics https://infisical.com/blog and merchandise to conference booths https://www.linkedin.com/posts/infisical_today-is-our-final-day-at-kubecon-come-say-activity-7394701827826651136-SgcU and launch campaigns, and build pixel-perfect digital experiences. Beyond that, you'll take on ambitious engineering and creative projects wherever they have the greatest impact.

You’ll work closely with our co-founder and the Marketing, Sales, and Developer Experience teams to:

 - Define and evolve Infisical’s brand identity, including the visual language, creative direction, and level of craft across everything we put into the world.

 - Design brand and marketing surfaces, including blog graphics, merchandise, presentations, conference booths, launch campaigns, and other creative assets.

 - Build and maintain Infisical.com http://Infisical.com, including pixel-perfect pages, reusable frontend components, CMS integrations, SEO, analytics, and marketing tooling.

 - Prototype and ship ambitious engineering and creative projects, including interactive demos, AI-powered experiences, open source initiatives, and internal tooling.



Requirements

 - Strong design and engineering skills, with experience building polished digital experiences and a portfolio demonstrating exceptional visual craft, creativity, and technical execution.

 - Deep mastery of JavaScript, React.js, Node.js, TypeScript, and frameworks like React/Next.js.

 - Exceptional taste and creative judgment, with the ability to translate abstract ideas into bold, cohesive, and beautifully crafted experiences.

 - Bias toward action: able to make decisions, iterate quickly, and take calculated risks.

 - Exceptional attention to detail and eagerness to learn.

 - Based in Canada or the United States (SF preferred).



Nice to have

 - Technical SEO fundamentals.

 - Experience with CMS platforms (e.g. Contentful, Sanity, etc.).

 - Experience configuring website analytics/marketing platform integrations such as with Google Analytics and HubSpot.

 - Experience with developer-facing products or startups.






Team, values & benefits

Our team brings experience from companies like Databricks, AWS, Red Hat, and more. We operate primarily as a remote team, but maintain a strong presence in San Francisco, where we have an office. We also get together in person throughout the year for off-sites, conferences, and team gatherings.

 

At Infisical, we offer competitive compensation, including both salary and equity options. Additional benefits, such as a lunch stipend and a work setup budget, are available with more details to be found on our careers page https://infisical.com/careers.

source_jobs.title: Developer Advocate
source_jobs.description:
Infisical is the open source security infrastructure platform that engineers use for secrets management, certificates, and privileged access management. We help developers and organizations securely manage billions of secrets every month including application configuration, database credentials, certificates, and more.



We’ve raised $19M from Y Combinator, Google, and Elad Gil, and our customers include Hugging Face, Lucid, and LG.



Join us on a mission to make security easier for all developers — starting with secrets management. We’re looking to hire exceptional talent to join us in building the open source security infrastructure stack for the AI era.



About the role

We’re looking for a Developer Advocate who’s excited about tools, security infrastructure, and developer experience. This role blends technical storytelling with content creation. Across documentation, educational videos, and community platforms — you will be the front line in educating developers with content that’s clear, engaging, and helpful. Whether it’s open source users or enterprise customers, you’ll help developers discover, adopt, and succeed with Infisical!



You’ll work closely with engineering and marketing to:

 - Create and publish technical content — across educational videos https://www.youtube.com/@infisical_os, technical documentation https://infisical.com/docs/documentation/getting-started/overview, demos, and more — to help developers understand and use Infisical.

 - Engage across platforms like Reddit, X https://x.com/infisical/status/2039080983085941039, Slack, and LinkedIn to drive visibility and participate in relevant developer conversations.

 - Develop and maintain technical documentation, including code samples, implementation guides, and feature references.

 - Collaborate with engineering and marketing to shape how we position technical features and communicate product value.

 - Help define and evolve our developer-facing voice, presence, and community strategy as the company scales.

 - Represent Infisical at technical conferences, meetups, and podcasts, communicating real-world solutions to real-world problems.
   
   

Requirements

 - Bachelor’s degree in computer science or 2+ years of experience in developer relations, developer advocacy, or technical community building.

 - Strong understanding of software engineering concepts, developer tooling, and infrastructure.

 - Exceptional written and verbal communication skills with the ability to explain complex topics clearly.

 - Comfortable creating content across multiple formats — written, video, and social.

 - Based in the US or Canada.



Nice to have

 - Previous experience as a software engineer or working on developer-facing products.

 - Experience managing or growing developer communities (e.g. Discord, Slack, GitHub discussions).

 - Familiarity with hosting developer-facing events.

 - Existing presence or credibility in developer communities (e.g. active on X, writes a personal blog, maintains OSS projects, etc.).



Team, values & benefits

Our team brings experience from companies like Databricks, AWS, Red Hat, and more. We operate primarily as a remote team, but maintain a strong presence in San Francisco, where we have an office. We also get together in person throughout the year for off-sites, conferences, and team gatherings.

 

At Infisical, we offer competitive compensation, including both salary and equity options. Additional benefits, such as a lunch stipend and a work setup budget, are available with more details to be found on our careers page https://infisical.com/careers.

source_jobs.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Infisical is the open source security infrastructure platform that engineers use for secrets management, certificates, and privileged access management. We help developers and organizations securely manage billions of secrets every month including application configuration, database credentials, certificates, and more.



We’ve raised $19M from Y Combinator, Google, and Elad Gil, and our customers include Hugging Face, Lucid, and LG.



Join us on a mission to make security easier for all developers — starting with secrets management. We’re looking to hire exceptional talent to join us in building the open source security infrastructure stack for the AI era.



About the role

We’re looking for an exceptional Senior Full Stack Engineer to help us build, optimize, and expand the foundation of the platform.



We’ve kept our hiring standards exceptionally high since we expect engineers to tackle a broad range of challenges on a day-to-day basis. Examples of past engineering initiatives include developing strategies for secret rotation and dynamic secrets, a gateway to provide secure access to private resources, protocols like EST https://infisical.com/docs/documentation/platform/pki/est and KMIP https://infisical.com/docs/documentation/platform/kms/kmip#kmip-integration, integrations for syncing secrets across cloud providers, and entire new product lines such as Infisical PKI and Infisical PAM.

 

You’ll be working closely with our CTO and the rest of the engineering team to:

 - Develop and maintain features whilst communicating directly with enterprise customers.

 - Expand our newer Infisical PKI https://infisical.com/docs/documentation/platform/pki/overview, Infisical PAM https://infisical.com/docs/documentation/platform/pam/overview, and Infisical KMS https://infisical.com/docs/documentation/platform/kms/overview product lines.

 - Experiment with novel approaches for applying AI to secrets management and more broadly security infrastructure.

 

Requirements

 - Deep technical mastery of the JavaScript ecosystem, particularly React.js, Node.js, and TypeScript (3+).

 - Exceptional attention to detail and eager to learn.

 - A bias toward action—able to make decisions with incomplete information, iterate quickly, and take calculated risks.

 - Based in the Americas (US or Canada), Brazil, India, UK, or EU. Must work US hours.

 

Nice to have

 - Expertise in Go.

 - Has some understanding of devops/developer tools.

 - Previous founder or startup experience.

 - Previous experience building in open source or developer tools in either a professional or personal setting.

 - Excellent written and oral communication skills to interact with customers directly.

 

Team, values & benefits

Our team brings experience from companies like Databricks, AWS, Red Hat, and more. We operate primarily as a remote team, but maintain a strong presence in San Francisco, where we have an office. We also get together in person throughout the year for off-sites, conferences, and team gatherings.

 

At Infisical, we offer competitive compensation, including both salary and equity options. Additional benefits, such as a lunch stipend and a work setup budget, are available with more details to be found on our careers page https://infisical.com/careers.

source_jobs.title: Growth Marketing Manager
source_jobs.description:
Infisical is the open source security infrastructure platform that engineers use for secrets management, certificates, and privileged access management. We help developers and organizations securely manage billions of secrets every month including application configuration, database credentials, certificates, and more.



We’ve raised $19M from Y Combinator, Google, and Elad Gil, and our customers include Hugging Face, Lucid, and LG.



Join us on a mission to make security easier for all developers — starting with secrets management. We’re looking to hire exceptional talent to join us in building the open source security infrastructure stack for the AI era.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We're looking for an exceptional Growth Marketing Manager who's excited about developer audiences, open source, and building scalable growth engines. This role blends hands-on execution with strategic ownership across user acquisition, demand generation, and brand. You'll own growth initiatives end-to-end—experimenting across channels, measuring what works, and helping more developers and organizations discover Infisical.



You'll work closely with marketing, Developer Relations, Sales, and Engineering to:

 - Own and scale growth across organic social, paid acquisition, SEO, lifecycle marketing, partnerships, influencer marketing and other emerging channels.

 - Build campaigns and experiments that generate measurable pipeline while continuously improving conversion throughout the funnel.

 - Make data-driven decisions by analyzing marketing data independently to determine campaign performance and success.

 - Help shape how Infisical is positioned in the market, building a brand that developers trust and recognize.

 - Leverage AI tooling, automation, and internal workflows to move faster and increase the impact of the marketing function.




REQUIREMENTS

 - 5–7 years of experience in growth marketing, digital marketing, or developer marketing at a B2B SaaS company, ideally in an early- or growth-stage startup.

 - Broad experience across multiple acquisition channels, including organic social, paid search, paid social, email, and SEO.

 - Strong analytical skills with experience using data to drive decisions, prioritize opportunities, and forecast results.

 - High ownership with the ability to operate autonomously and execute quickly without an existing playbook.

 - Strong command of AI tools, including experience using AI agents, automation, or custom workflows to improve productivity.

 - Based in the US or Canada.




NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience marketing to developers or technical buyers in security, infrastructure, DevOps, or developer tools.

 - Experience with influencer marketing.

 - Experience building brand awareness and category presence at an early-stage startup.

 - Hands-on experience with modern marketing tooling, automation platforms, attribution, or internal growth tooling including Hubspot, Salesforce and GA4.

 - Familiarity with open source or product-led growth go-to-market motions.




TEAM, VALUES & BENEFITS

Our team brings experience from companies like Databricks, AWS, Red Hat, and more. We operate primarily as a remote team, but maintain a strong presence in San Francisco, where we have an office. We also get together in person throughout the year for off-sites, conferences, and team gatherings.

At Infisical, we offer competitive compensation, including both salary and equity options. Additional benefits, such as a lunch stipend and a work setup budget, are available with more details to be found on our careers page https://infisical.com/careers.

source_jobs.title: DX Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Infisical is the open source security infrastructure platform that engineers use for secrets management, certificates, and privileged access management. We help developers and organizations securely manage billions of secrets every month including application configuration, database credentials, certificates, and more.



We’ve raised $19M from Y Combinator, Google, and Elad Gil, and our customers include Hugging Face, Lucid, and LG.



Join us on a mission to make security easier for all developers — starting with secrets management. We’re looking to hire exceptional talent to join us in building the open source security infrastructure stack for the AI era.



About the role
We're looking for a DX Engineer who is excited to write technical documentation, make the user experience agent-friendly, and drive adoption of Infisical across the ecosystem.

This is a high-impact role focused on helping developers succeed with Infisical by owning our documentation, guides, and materials. You'll shape how developers discover, learn, and grow with Infisical by writing documentation, and engaging with the community through technical content and conversation.

You'll work closely with engineering and marketing to:

 - Develop and maintain technical documentation with docs-as-code, including code samples, implementation guides, and feature references.

 - Create educational materials such as self-paced courses to help developers go from zero to hero on secrets management.

 - Own product updates, white papers, and the developer newsletter.

 - Collaborate with engineering to continuously review and improve documentation accuracy and usability.

 - Build and maintain scalable documentation systems and tooling, including automated pipelines and feedback loops.

 - Leverage AI tools and modern workflows to stay ahead of how developers discover and consume technical content.



Requirements

 - Bachelor's degree in computer science or 2+ years of experience in developer relations, developer advocacy, technical content marketing, or technical writing.

 - Strong understanding of software engineering concepts, developer tooling, and infrastructure.

 - Exceptional written and verbal communication skills with the ability to explain complex topics clearly.

 - Based in the US or Canada.



Nice to have

 - CS degree or hands-on coding experience.

 - Up-to-date with the latest AI tooling, tech and trends.
   
   

Team, values & benefits

Our team brings experience from companies like Databricks, AWS, Red Hat, and more. We operate primarily as a remote team, but maintain a strong presence in San Francisco, where we have an office. We also get together in person throughout the year for off-sites, conferences, and team gatherings.

 

At Infisical, we offer competitive compensation, including both salary and equity options. Additional benefits, such as a lunch stipend and a work setup budget, are available with more details to be found on our careers page https://infisical.com/careers.

source_jobs.title: Design Engineer, Platform
source_jobs.description:
Infisical is the open source security infrastructure platform that engineers use for secrets management, certificates, and privileged access management. We help developers and organizations securely manage billions of secrets every month including application configuration, database credentials, certificates, and more.



We’ve raised $19M from Y Combinator, Google, and Elad Gil, and our customers include Hugging Face, Lucid, and LG.



Join us on a mission to make security easier for all developers — starting with secrets management. We’re looking to hire exceptional talent to join us in building the open source security infrastructure stack for the AI era.



About the role

We’re looking for a Design Engineer who is excited to own and elevate the user-facing experience of our rapidly growing platform. You should excel at creating features end-to-end with a strong focus on look and feel (~30% backend development).



Infisical is a deeply technical product with user and developer experience at the heart of our product philosophy. We obsess over product design and have made rounds to redesign just about every part of the platform since inception. Examples of past initiatives include revamping existing features like secret syncs https://infisical.com/docs/integrations/secret-syncs/overview and secret rotation https://infisical.com/docs/documentation/platform/secret-rotation/overview; and developing new product lines ground up such as Infisical PKI and PAM.



You’ll be working closely with the co-founders and engineering team to:

 - Revamp and elevate. Continuously improve the look, feel, and usability of Infisical. Rethink navigation, redesign workflows, and raise the bar on every surface of the product.

 - Own the design system. Build and maintain a reusable component library that makes it easy for the rest of the team to ship polished UI without getting stuck on design decisions.

 - Be the design voice on the team. Work closely with other engineers to unblock them on UX questions, critique implementations, and push the team to make intuitive UI.

 - Build end-to-end. Take features from concept to production across the stack, with a strong focus on the frontend experience.



Requirements

 - Deep technical mastery of the JavaScript ecosystem, particularly React and TypeScript (3+ years of experience).

 - A sharp eye for product design and intuitive UX. When you notice when something feels off, you know how to fix it.

 - Exceptional attention to detail and willingness to iterate quickly with feedback.

 - Based in North or South America.



Nice to have

 - Prior experience with product design or design tools like Figma. You can contribute to the design process, not just implement it.

 - Prior experience building or maintaining design systems.



Team, values & benefits

Our team brings experience from companies like Databricks, AWS, Red Hat, and more. We operate primarily as a remote team, but maintain a strong presence in San Francisco, where we have an office. We also get together in person throughout the year for off-sites, conferences, and team gatherings.

 

At Infisical, we offer competitive compensation, including both salary and equity options. Additional benefits, such as a lunch stipend and a work setup budget, are available with more details to be found on our careers page https://infisical.com/careers.

notes: Infisical is a security infrastructure platform with a strong engineering focus.
